title: Smoky Crunchy Canadian Sevaiiya Agemono
description: A smoky, crunchy, low-sodium-friendly midnight craving dish featuring sevaiiya and agemono-deep-fry.
instructions: Dust sevaiiya with flour and cornstarch to prevent sticking.
In a bowl, whisk together eggs and buttermilk.
Heat 2-3 inches of oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Dip sevaiiya into the egg mixture and then coat with the flour-cornstarch mixture, shaking off excess.
Carefully place the sevaiiya in the hot oil and cook for 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the sevaiiya from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle smoked paprika and garlic powder over the sevaiiya and toss to combine.
Repeat the process with the remaining sevaiiya, cooking in batches as needed.
Increase oil temperature to 400°F (200°C) and deep-fry the sevaiiya until crispy and golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the sevaiiya from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
